common.skillsFallbackNotice: Camp zh-TW skill data is not yet available for this hero. Showing English client text; stats and builds remain from Camp HOK.
common.learnBodyNotice: Article body uses live Camp HOK international stats (English hero names).

decision.label: Ranked quick read
decision.title: {name} TL;DR
decision.metaLine: {name} is a Tier {tier} {lane} pick with {wr} win rate.
decision.coreFallback: See the full build table for the current item order.
decision.counterCtaHint: Matchup notes, strong targets, and heroes that punish {name}.

pick.highTier: You need a current high-priority {lane} pick and your draft can play around its main timing.
pick.marksman: Your team can protect the backline and give you time to scale into item spikes.
pick.mage: Your draft needs mid wave clear, objective poke, or reliable control before fights.
pick.assassin: Enemy carries lack reliable peel, and your side lanes can help secure early jungle tempo.
pick.support: Your carry needs peel or engage setup, and your team can follow your first crowd-control window.
pick.tank: Your draft lacks frontline and needs someone to start fights around objectives.
pick.warrior: You need side-lane pressure, durable skirmishing, or a flank threat into the enemy backline.
pick.default: Your team needs a stable {role} pick and the enemy draft has not shown hard counters.

avoid.marksman: The enemy has multiple hard-diving assassins or your team lacks reliable peel.
avoid.mage: The enemy can dodge or interrupt your key control, or your team already lacks sustained damage.
avoid.assassin: The enemy draft has strong peel, tanky frontliners, and few isolated carry targets.
avoid.support: Your team cannot follow engage, or the enemy can punish your carry before you stabilize lane.
avoid.tank: Your team lacks damage behind you, or the enemy can kite long front-to-back fights.
avoid.warrior: The enemy can kite side lane pressure and collapse faster than your team can trade objectives.
avoid.default: The enemy draft removes your main timing or forces you into unfavorable lane pressure.

climb.title: Climb Picks — Best Heroes This Patch
climb.subtitle: Top 5 heroes per lane ranked by meta score (tier + pick/ban pressure + win rate). Camp HOK international data.
climb.dataDisclaimer: Recommendations use Camp HOK live stats. Pair with bans and your role pool — not official pro tier lists.
climb.reasonStable: Tier {tier} with {wr} WR — stable lane pick

comps.title: Team Comps & Duos
comps.subtitle: Curated duo synergies and fast-push templates for ranked. Honest data sourcing — no fake duo win rates.

build.presetsHint: {count} presets — switch by draft, lane, or CN meta. Default matches {lane} when available.

counters.strongHint: Pick {name} when the enemy drafts these heroes.
counters.weakHint: Avoid {name} or ban these when they appear on the enemy team.
counters.campHint: Official counter reference from Camp HOK rank statistics.
counters.hokmetaHint: Advanced counter analysis combining win rate, pick rate, and matchup data.

teamfight.tank: Engage on the enemy carry when your team can follow. Body-block skillshots for your marksman.
teamfight.warrior: Flank or dive the backline after tanks commit. Do not start without vision on the enemy jungler.
teamfight.assassin: Wait for team CC, then burst the carry with your full combo. Exit with flash or resets if focused.
teamfight.mage: Poke at max range before objectives. Save hard CC for enemy dive or peel windows.
teamfight.marksman: Stay behind the frontline; hit the closest safe target. Join only after enemy dive cooldowns are spent.
teamfight.support: Peel your carry first, then look for picks. Ward Tyrant ~30s before spawn.
teamfight.default: Stay with your team, play around objectives, and commit when you have numbers.

attribution.title: Meta data & editorial
attribution.buildNote: Builds list end-game items; in-match purchase order may differ. Win/pick/ban and builds are re-synced after each Camp HOK data pull.
attribution.disclaimer: Not affiliated with Tencent or Level Infinite.

trends.title: Hero Trends
trends.subtitle: Meta leaderboards from Camp HOK international ranked — updated each sync.
trends.syncNote: Last sync: {date}. Duo and comp boards use lane-based top picks from Camp data — not official pair win rates or KPL replays. Cross-check on
trends.patchStrongestHint: Tier S+ / S heroes with highest win rate this sync
trends.soloQueueHint: Meta score with 51%+ win rate — strong picks without a premade
trends.proPressureHint: Ban + pick weight on global Camp (no live KPL API)
trends.bestDuosHint: One pair per lane strategy — roam/bot, mid/jungle, side gank, engage/pick
trends.metaCompsHint: Five-hero templates: balanced, fast push, protect carry, ban core

playbook.safeTrade: Trade with safest skill, confirm cooldowns, then commit ultimate.
playbook.comboAllInSteps: {ult} after full rotation when enemy escape is down
playbook.comboAllInWhen: River gank or backline dive with team CC
playbook.itemCore: Core item #{slot} in the recommended {lane} path.
playbook.passiveHookNoDesc: {name} is a {lane} {role} with {difficulty} difficulty on Honor of Kings Global.

skillOrder.jungleReason: {s2} usually provides mobility or stick—max first for ganks. {s1} second for damage. {ult} on every level available.
skillOrder.mageReason: Wave clear and poke from {s2} first. {s1} for trade patterns. {ult} whenever unlocked for fight swing.
skillOrder.adcReason: {s1} is your lane trade tool—max for farm lane pressure. {s2} second for peel or burst. {ult} on cooldown.
skillOrder.defaultReason: Max your primary trade skill first, then {s2} for utility, and {ult} on every level.

laning.jungling: Clear to level four, then gank the lane with the least escape. Secure Tyrant when your bot or mid has crash wave.
laning.mid: Control first wave without taking free poke. Roam after pushing wave 2–4 to side lanes with your jungler.
laning.farm: Last-hit safely until first core item. Ping jungler for river vision; never face-check brush without minion cover.
laning.clash: Trade on your power spike levels (2/4). Call jungler for dive only when enemy flash is down.
laning.roam: Help marksman crash wave, then rotate mid for picks. Return before Tyrant if your carry has no escape.

faq.laningDefault: Play {name} in the {lane} role: farm to first core, then fight on your ultimate timer.
faq.highRankStaple: {name} is a Tier {tier} staple in high-elo (Diamond+) on the international server — worth mastering for climb.
faq.highRankViable: {name} is a viable Tier A pick in high rank with {wr} win rate — strong in one-trick hands or as a counter-pick.
faq.highRankNiche: {name} sits at Tier {tier} globally ({wr} WR). In high rank, pick only into favorable matchups or when you have a dedicated pocket pick.
faq.highRankBan: Ban rate {ban} — expect {name} to be removed in tryhard lobbies; have a backup in the same role.
faq.highRankPick: Pick rate {pick} — frequently seen in ranked; learn the matchup even if you do not main {name}.
faq.highRankLowPick: Low pick rate {pick} — niche in high rank; surprise value if you perfect the kit.
faq.highRankAboveAvg: Camp data shows above-average win rate — prioritize when not hard-countered in draft.
faq.highRankBelowAvg: Below 49% global WR — high-rank players often avoid unless compensating for team comp.
faq.peerWrWin: {name} has +{diff}% WR vs {peer} in Camp data.
faq.peerCompare: {name} vs {peer} ({peerRole}, Tier {peerTier}): {peer} is {peerPick} pick / {peerWr} WR. {wrNote} Choose {name} when you need {lane} identity; choose {peer} for {peerLane} comfort.

q.goodSeason: Is {name} good in the current meta?
q.highRank: Is {name} good in high rank / Diamond+?

a.goodSeason: {name} is Tier {tier} {role} with {wr} win rate, {pick} pick rate, and {ban} ban rate on Honor of Kings Global (Camp HOK, {date}). {tierNote}
a.bestBuild: Core item path: {build}. Run {arcana} arcana with {spells}. Switch to alternate build presets on this page for jungle, clash, or late-game setups.
a.counter: Pick {weak} into {name}. Deny {lane} resources early and force fights before {name} completes core items. {name} struggles when the enemy can {struggle} them.
a.strongInto: {name} is strong into {into} according to HoKStats matchup data and role matchups on the global server. Draft {name} when the enemy relies on these heroes in the {lane} lane.
a.arcana: Recommended: {arcana} arcana. Battle spell: {spells}. Adjust Purify/Execute based on enemy dive and jungle need.
a.banYes: Yes in tryhard queues — {ban} ban rate. Deny if enemy first-picks {role}.
a.banOptional: Optional ban when enemy spams {role}; {pick} pick rate but only {ban} ban rate.
a.banLow: Low priority ban ({ban}). Focus bans on higher-tier {role} picks unless targeting a one-trick.

about.title: About HOK Meta
about.p1: Data-driven Honor of Kings global meta — tier lists, builds, counters, and guides.
about.p2: We cover {count} Honor of Kings global server heroes with English skills, item builds (icons + descriptions), Arcana, counters, and Camp HOK win/pick/ban stats. Data is synced from official Camp metrics and HoKStats.gg international references — not invented.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.p1: {name} ({domain}) publishes Honor of Kings meta guides and tools. This site is operated by {author}.
privacy.collectBody: We do not require account registration. Standard server and analytics logs may record IP address, browser type, and pages visited. Third-party ad partners (e.g. Google AdSense) may use cookies per their policies.
privacy.cookiesBody: Cookies may be used for advertising, analytics, and site preferences. You can disable cookies in your browser settings.
privacy.contactBody: For privacy questions, contact the site operator via the domain {domain}.

search.title: Search Results
search.label: Search
search.empty: Enter a hero name in the header search.

counterPage.title: How to Counter {name}
counterPage.subtitle: Best counters in Honor of Kings {season}
counterPage.source: Counter list from Camp HOK reference — no official matchup win rates
counterPage.bestCounterBaseData: Base counter data from Camp HOK rank statistics
counterPage.sameLaneHint: Direct lane matchup — most impactful counter picks.
counterPage.metaTrendNoData: Meta trend data for {name} will be available in the next data sync.
counterPage.quickMeta: {name} is a {role} in {lane}. Beat it by drafting direct answers, denying the first power spike, and saving control for its commit window.
counterPage.quickNoCounters: No reliable counter list for {name} yet. Use the plan on the right and check again after the next sync.

lane.marksman: Pressure the first two waves, contest river vision, and force {name} to last-hit under threat before core items.
lane.mage: Push only when you can track jungle. Bait the key control spell, then punish the cooldown window with a roam or gank.
lane.assassin: Protect early jungle entrances, ping missing routes, and collapse with numbers instead of accepting isolated duels.
lane.support: Break its first roam timing by clearing mid faster and matching the first river move with your jungler.
lane.tank: Do not trade into full cooldowns. Thin the wave, keep distance, and call jungle when {name} overextends.
lane.warrior: Hold the wave near your tower and punish failed engages; side-lane counters matter more than blind all-ins.
lane.default: Respect the first power spike, trade only after key cooldowns are used, and avoid fighting in fog.

teamfight.marksman: Keep one hard CC or dive threat for {name}. Do not chase tanks while it free-hits from the backline.
teamfight.mage: Spread before objectives and save interrupt tools for the main damage/control cast.
teamfight.assassin: Group with peel, control flank bushes, and wait for {name} to reveal before committing your carries.
teamfight.support: Track engage cooldowns and punish missed crowd control; do not let {name} start fights from fog.
teamfight.tank: Kite first, then re-engage after {name} spends its mobility or ultimate.
teamfight.warrior: Force front-to-back fights and deny flank angles; collapse only when {name} has no escape route.
teamfight.default: Fight around vision, hold control for the commit window, and convert the first pick into an objective.

draft.marksman: Pick hard engage, long-range poke, or assassins that can reach the backline before {name} completes damage items.
draft.mage: Draft displacement, mobility, or long-range poke so {name} cannot control the first objective setup.
draft.assassin: Draft peel, point-and-click control, and tanky frontliners; avoid double squishy backlines.
draft.support: Draft wave clear and disengage so {name} cannot snowball early roam windows.
draft.tank: Draft sustained DPS and penetration. Burst-only comps waste damage into {name}.
draft.warrior: Draft kite, anti-heal if needed, and side-lane heroes that do not lose wave control.
draft.default: If your comp lacks control, peel, or a lane answer, ban {name} instead of hoping to outplay it.

counterPage.faqWhoAnswer: {list} are strong picks into {name} on the international server.
counterPage.faqWhoNone: No reliable counter list for {name} yet — check back after the next data sync.
counterPage.faqHowToLaneAnswer: {name}'s weakness is {weakness}. Deny {lane} resources early, don't let them farm for free. Save hard CC in teamfights to interrupt their key ability.
counterPage.faqWeaknessAnswer: {name}'s main weakness: {weakness}. Exploit these windows to beat them.
counterPage.faqSeasonAnswer: {name} is Tier {tier} with {wr} win rate, {pick} pick rate, and {ban} ban rate (Camp HOK, {date}).
counterPage.faqUltimateGeneric: Save hard CC for when {name} commits with ultimate; spread formation and disengage during the power window.
counterPage.faqItemsGeneric: Build resist and HP vs {name}'s damage profile ({role}); Purify or grievous wounds when their kit relies on CC or sustain.
counterPage.whyGenericPeel: Tanks and supports peel and lock {name} before they reach carry-killing range.
counterPage.whyGenericAssassin: Assassins punish {name} when key defensive cooldowns are down.
counterPage.whyGenericMage: Mages outrange {name} in lane and force skill trades on their terms.
counterPage.whyGenericDraft: {list} fit the current international counter list for this matchup.
counterPage.whyGenericPassive: Their kit revolves around: {hook} — counters that interrupt or outscale this win condition work best.
counterPage.whyGenericEarly: Early pressure before {name} completes core items and hits power spikes.
counterPage.mistakeMarksmanPeel: Letting {name} free-hit your backline — draft peel or hard engage when they jump.
counterPage.mistakeMarksmanPosition: Standing in skill hitboxes without sidestepping — treat every trade as skill-dodge practice.
counterPage.mistakeMarksmanItems: Building only one resist type when {name} deals mixed or true damage.
counterPage.mistakeAssassinVision: Face-checking fog without knowing {name} position on the map.
counterPage.mistakeAssassinDive: Engaging 5v5 while {name} has full combo and escape tools ready.
counterPage.mistakeAssassinReset: Chasing a low {name} through enemy jungle without collapse.
counterPage.mistakeMagePosition: Standing in wave line for {name} to land skill combos for free.
counterPage.mistakeMageCooldown: Hard engaging while {name} still has crowd-control abilities available.
counterPage.mistakeMageWave: Roaming without punishing {name} after they burn skills on the minion wave.
counterPage.mistakeTankIsolate: Isolating without team follow-up — {name} kites or peels against solo targets.
counterPage.mistakeTankKite: Chasing mobile carries instead of zoning {name} off objectives.
counterPage.mistakeTankItems: Skipping grievous wounds or penetration when {name} stacks sustain or armor.
counterPage.mistakeDefaultTrade: Trading on even cooldowns when {name} wins extended fights.
counterPage.mistakeDefaultObjective: Starting dragons or Tyrant while {name} has ultimate available.
counterPage.mistakeDefaultDraft: Blind-picking without banning or counter-picking into {name}'s comfort matchups.

rationale.title: Build philosophy
rationale.summaryDefault: {name} benefits from {priorities} — match items and runes to kit scaling.
rationale.arcanaDefault: Prioritize runes that boost {priorities} for this hero's passive and skill scaling.
rationale.itemWhyFallback: Core item for slot {slot} in this build path.
rationale.arcanaFallback: Runes aligned with {priorities} for this hero.
